import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let words = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut best = ""
mut best_len = 0
mut i = 0
while i < words.len()
  let w = match words.get(i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    ""
  end
  let l = string.len(w)
  if l > best_len
    best = w
    best_len = l
  end
  i = i + 1
end

print("longest=#{best}")
